headline_seed: Pope Leo XIV issued his harshest condemnation of the Iran war yet, indirectly slamming the United States as a perpetrator of the “demonic cycle of evil” that is fueling the conflict.
draft_text:
Pope Leo XIV held a peace vigil at St. Peter's Saturday, delivering his strongest condemnation yet of the Iran war: "Enough of the idolatry of self and money. Enough with war." NPR and CBS News both confirm the remarks.

And that's the mews.
